title: Script/Stmt are public type aliases with no stability contract
description: SCENARIO: Script = Vec<Stmt> and Stmt = Vec<Form> are pub type aliases. Any caller can construct, destructure, or pattern-match on Vec<Vec<Form>> directly. If the representation ever needs to change (e.g. adding position tracking, wrapping in a struct, or adding metadata), that is a breaking semver change. There is no doc comment on either alias documenting whether they are considered stable API. MAINTENANCE CONSEQUENCE: Either the representation is frozen forever, or a future minor refactor requires a major version bump. Fix: add a doc comment explicitly stating whether these aliases are considered stable public API, and whether callers should treat them as opaque or structural.
